articles.title: Chris Mason: Emphatic win leaves Starmer with big decision on leadership
articles.description: The PM will see the stonking scale of Andy Burnham's victory - will it shift his outlook, his defiance, so frequently recently expressed?

articles.title: Burnham says 'tonight could be the turning point' in his victory speech
articles.description: Andy Burnham delivers his victory speech after Makerfiled by-election.

articles.title: Scottish Conservatives win first Westminster by-election in more than 50 years
articles.description: The Tories take Aberdeen South, while the SNP wins in Arbroath and Broughty Ferry.

articles.title: Sir John Curtice: Burnham's win against Reform represents remarkable personal success
articles.description: Andy Burnham not only retained the share of the vote Labour won in the seat in 2024 but increased it.
